mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GROUP_MORAK ( group_no, no, group_title, category, user_max, price, area, addr1, addr2, latitude, longitude, start_date, last_date, comment1, comment2, type, img_url1, img_url2, img_url3 ) VALUES ( group_seq.nextval, #{no}, #{group_title}, #{category}, #{user_max}, #{price}, #{area}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{start_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{last_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{comment1}, #{comment2}, #{type}, #{img_url1, jdbcType=BLOB}, #{img_url2, jdbcType=BLOB},#{img_url3, jdbcType=BLOB} )
INSERT INTO MEMBER_GROUP(MEMBER_GROUP_NO, NO, GROUP_NO, STATUS) VALUES(member_group_seq.nextval, #{no}, group_seq.nextval-1, 'LEADER')
mapper.select:
SELECT group_no, group_title, category, user_max, price, area, comment2, type, reg_date, start_date,
img_url1 FROM GROUP_MORAK WHERE type=#{type}

SELECT G.*, MG.*, MG.NO AS MEMBER_NO, M.NICKNAME, M.IMG_URL AS PROFILE_IMG, M.STAR_SUM, COUNT(CASE WHEN MG.STATUS = 'MEMBER' THEN 1 END) OVER (PARTITION BY G.GROUP_NO) AS MEMBER_COUNT FROM GROUP_MORAK G LEFT JOIN MEMBER_GROUP MG ON G.GROUP_NO = MG.GROUP_NO INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON G.NO = M.NO WHERE G.GROUP_NO = #{groupNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE GROUP_MORAK SET GROUP_TITLE = #{group_title}, START_DATE = #{start_date, jdbcType=DATE}, LAST_DATE = #{last_date, jdbcType=DATE}, USER_MAX = #{user_max}, PRICE = #{price}, ADDR1 = #{addr1}, ADDR2 = #{addr2}, area= #{area}, COMMENT1 = #{comment1}, COMMENT2 = #{comment2}, TYPE = #{type}, CATEGORY = #{category}, LATITUDE = #{latitude}, LONGITUDE = #{longitude}, IMG_URL1 = #{img_url1, jdbcType=BLOB},IMG_URL2 = #{img_url2, jdbcType=BLOB}, IMG_URL3 = #{img_url3, jdbcType=BLOB} WHERE group_no = #{group_no}
UPDATE MEMBER SET MONEY = MONEY - #{price} WHERE NO = #{no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BASKET SELECT basket_seq.nextval, #{no}, #{group_no}, G.PRICE, SYSDATE, G.START_DATE, G.LAST_DATE, 'BASKET' FROM GROUP_MORAK G WHERE G.GROUP_NO = #{group_no}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM MEMBER_GROUP MG INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON MG.NO = M.NO WHERE GROUP_NO = #{group_no}
SELECT STATUS FROM MEMBER_GROUP MG INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON MG.NO = M.NO WHERE GROUP_NO = #{group_no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORT(rep_no, reporter_no, reported_no, reason) VALUES(report_seq.NEXTVAL, #{reporter_no}, #{reported_no}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT gm.group_no AS groupNo, gm.group_title AS gTitle, gm.start_date AS startDate, gm.img_url1 AS imgUrl1, gm.area AS addr1 FROM group_morak gm JOIN member m ON gm.no = m.no WHERE gm.category = #{category} AND gm.start_date > CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY m.star_sum DESC FETCH FIRST 6 ROWS ONLY

SELECT gm.group_no AS groupNo, gm.group_title AS gTitle, gm.start_date AS startDate, gm.img_url1 AS imgUrl1, gm.area AS addr1 FROM group_morak gm JOIN member m ON gm.no = m.no WHERE gm.start_date > CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY m.star_sum DESC FETCH FIRST 6 ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) - 1 AS MEMBER_COUNT, G.USER_MAX FROM MEMBER_GROUP M INNER JOIN GROUP_MORAK G ON M.GROUP_NO = G.GROUP_NO WHERE M.GROUP_NO = #{groupNo} GROUP BY USER_MAX
